# CWE-656: Reliance on Security Through Obscurity (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-656-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type ConfigEntry struct {
	Key   string
	Value string
}

// Safe: configuration access requires authenticated admin authorization.
func HiddenConfigPanel(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	role, _ := c.Get("role")
	if role != "admin" {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	var entries []ConfigEntry
	db.Find(&entries)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, entries)
}
